arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey Names His Ultimate Teammates 11
arts.sum: Ramsey named five former Arsenal players in his ultimate teammates XI.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey joins Mikel Arteta and calls out Arsenal star after Bournemouth loss
arts.sum: Former Arsenal midfielder Aaron Ramsey has had his say on Saturday's loss against Bournemouth and questioned two players for their role in the game's opening goal

arts.ttl: How to watch Cardiff City v Portsmouth on Sky Sports+ tonight
arts.sum: The Bluebirds are still without a manager but have won two of their last three matches under Omer Riza

arts.ttl: ‘Adds extra to game’: Portsmouth boss feels gravity of Cardiff City showdown with big prize at stake
arts.sum: John Mousinho acknowledged the significance of his team’s Cardiff City clash as they bid to climb out of the Championship drop zone.

arts.ttl: Cardiff City v Portsmouth: predicted line-up with big calls to make
arts.sum: Pompey head to Cardiff seeking to maintain that winning feeling following their Loftus Road breakthrough.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey only includes FIVE Arsenal players in his best XI of former team-mates, with Cristiano Ronaldo, Gareth Bale and Mesut Ozil all making the cut
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsey, who plays in the Championship with boyhood club Cardiff City, has enjoyed a glittering career at several top clubs across Europe including Arsenal and Juventus.

Trey George scored alongside a Michael Reindorf brace as the young Bluebirds battled against a senior Cymru Premier outfit, going ahead for the first time in the 92nd minute of play. Barton continued his good work down the left and was match by the direct play of Isaac Jefferies down the right, who create a number of chances with a series of good deliveries into the area, the pair repeatedly testing ‘keeper Alex Lang.

arts.ttl: Football fans rip into Aaron Ramsey's 'boring' cameo on Sky Sports after former Arsenal star made his presenting debut during Nottingham Forest's win over Crystal Palace
arts.sum: The former Arsenal star took centre stage for Sky Sports' Monday Night Football programme which showcased the evening match between Crystal Palace and Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey gives honest thoughts on INEOS after working with Man Utd owners
arts.sum: INEOS became involved at Manchester United in February following Sir Jim Ratcliffe's £1.3billion deal to acquire a minority stake in the club, but fans haven't witnessed progress this season

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe and INEOS will do an 'unbelievable job' at transforming Man United, says Aaron Ramsey as he offers insight having played for sister club Nice
arts.sum: Ramsey, formerly of Nice, part of INEOS' multi-club network, made the prediction after spending time with figures at the top of the company.
